strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript/Node.js, React, and multiple languages
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching AI agent requirement
Strong testing/TDD background with workshops, Selenium courses, and custom test frameworks
concerns: Resume lists MongoDB but no explicit PostgreSQL/MySQL production depth shown
Limited explicit cloud platform detail (AWS CDK mentioned once, no GCP/Azure/Kubernetes depth beyond GISCollective)
No Nest.js or Vitest mentioned explicitly in stack history
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with well over the required 6 years, current AI-agent and MCP work directly aligned with the role, and a strong testing and craftsmanship orientation. Primary stack alignment is partial — TypeScript, Node.js, and React are well-covered, but Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly evidenced, and cloud/database breadth is lighter than the JD requests. Overall profile fits the senior IC full-stack shape the role describes.
